name: orc-smash
description: A thin TypeScript CLI harness that drives coding-agent CLIs through skill-based audit ↔ follow-up loops

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && mkdir -p dist/src/adapters && cp -R config roles skills skills.yaml package.json dist/ && cp src/adapters/process-group-bootstrap.mjs dist/src/adapters/process-group-bootstrap.mjs
